description: go.mod is initialized at module path github.com/sambo/ai-projects-go with go 1.22 and azcore as a direct dependency
steps: Run: cd /Users/goubo/projects/ai-projects-go && go mod init github.com/sambo/ai-projects-go
Verify go.mod exists and contains 'module github.com/sambo/ai-projects-go'

description: Empty azaiprojects package with doc.go and version constant compiles cleanly
steps: Create azaiprojects/doc.go with package comment 'Package azaiprojects is a Go port of @azure/ai-projects.'
Create azaiprojects/version.go with const ModuleVersion = "0.1.0" and const ModuleName = "azaiprojects"

description: azaiprojects.ClientOptions exists, embeds azcore policy.ClientOptions, and exposes APIVersion with default "v1"
steps: Create azaiprojects/options.go declaring type ClientOptions struct embedding azcore.ClientOptions, with field APIVersion string
Declare const APIVersionV1 = "v1" in same file
Add a unit test in azaiprojects/options_test.go that constructs ClientOptions{} and asserts the zero value APIVersion is empty (caller defaults handled by client constructor)

description: azaiprojects.NewClient(endpoint, cred, opts) returns a client with stored endpoint, default api-version v1, and azcore pipeline using scope https://ai.azure.com/.default
steps: Create azaiprojects/client.go with type Client struct holding endpoint string, apiVersion string, pl runtime.Pipeline

Implement func NewClient(endpoint string, cred azcore.TokenCredential, opts *ClientOptions) (*Client, error) — defaulting opts to &ClientOptions{}, defaulting APIVersion to APIVersionV1, building pipeline with runtime.NewPipeline(ModuleName, ModuleVersion, runtime.PipelineOptions{}, &opts.ClientOptions) and a bearer-token policy with scope https://ai.azure.com/.default
Add Endpoint() string and APIVersion() string accessors

Add azaiprojects/client_test.go using a fake azcore.TokenCredential to call NewClient with endpoint 'https://example.test' and assert: client.Endpoint() == 'https://example.test', client.APIVersion() == 'v1'

description: internal/shared package exposes a generic newPager helper wrapping runtime.Pager for {value:[],nextLink:string} responses
steps: Create azaiprojects/internal/shared/paging.go declaring type PageResponse[T any] struct { Value []T `json:"value"`; NextLink *string `json:"nextLink,omitempty"` }
Add a unit test azaiprojects/internal/shared/paging_test.go that unmarshals a JSON literal {"value":[1,2,3],"nextLink":"x"} into PageResponse[int] and asserts Value==[1,2,3] and *NextLink=="x"

description: azaiprojects/connections package defines Connection struct and ConnectionType + CredentialType constants matching TS models
steps: Create azaiprojects/connections/models.go with type Connection struct { Name, ID, Type, Target string; IsDefault bool; Credentials BaseCredentials; Metadata map[string]string }

Define type ConnectionType string with constants ConnectionTypeAzureOpenAI="AzureOpenAI", ConnectionTypeAzureBlob="AzureBlob", ConnectionTypeAzureAISearch="CognitiveSearch", ConnectionTypeCustomKeys="CustomKeys" (cross-check src/models/models.ts to confirm string values)

Define type BaseCredentials struct { Type string; APIKey, SASToken string } (catch-all for ApiKeyCredentials/EntraIDCredentials/SASTokenCredentials/NoAuth/CustomCredential — full union split lands in a later task)
Add azaiprojects/connections/models_test.go that round-trips a Connection JSON value with type:"AzureOpenAI" and asserts ConnectionType == ConnectionTypeAzureOpenAI

description: ConnectionsClient.NewListPager returns paged Connections from GET /connections?api-version=v1
steps: Create azaiprojects/connections/client.go with type Client struct holding endpoint, apiVersion, pl runtime.Pipeline

Add constructor func NewClient(parent *azaiprojects.Client) *Client (use an internal accessor to expose pipeline+endpoint+apiVersion to subpackages — add azaiprojects.Client.Internal() returning a struct with these fields)

Implement NewListPager(opts *ListOptions) *runtime.Pager[ListResponse] where ListOptions has ConnectionType *ConnectionType and DefaultConnection *bool, ListResponse wraps shared.PageResponse[Connection]
Wire the pager to GET {endpoint}/connections with query params api-version, connectionType, defaultConnection

Add azaiprojects/connections/client_list_test.go using a fake policy.Transporter that asserts: method == GET, path == /connections, query has api-version=v1, returns a fixture body {"value":[{"name":"c1","type":"AzureOpenAI"}]}
Verify the pager yields one page with one Connection named c1

description: ConnectionsClient.NewListPager appends connectionType and defaultConnection query params when set
steps: Add a unit test that calls NewListPager with ListOptions{ConnectionType: ptr(ConnectionTypeAzureOpenAI), DefaultConnection: ptr(true)}
Assert outgoing request URL query has api-version=v1, connectionType=AzureOpenAI, defaultConnection=true

description: ConnectionsClient.Get(ctx, name) issues GET /connections/{name}?api-version=v1 and returns a Connection
steps: Implement Get(ctx, name string, opts *GetOptions) (GetResponse, error) where GetResponse wraps Connection
Add a test using fake transporter: call Get(ctx, "c1"), assert request method GET, path /connections/c1, query api-version=v1, returns body {"name":"c1","type":"AzureOpenAI"}

description: ConnectionsClient.GetWithCredentials issues GET /connections/{name}/getConnectionWithCredentials?api-version=v1
steps: Implement GetWithCredentials(ctx, name string, opts *GetWithCredentialsOptions) (GetWithCredentialsResponse, error)
Add a test asserting request path is /connections/c1/getConnectionWithCredentials and method GET

description: ConnectionsClient.GetDefault(ctx, connectionType, opts) lists connections with defaultConnection=true filter and returns the first match
steps: Implement GetDefault(ctx context.Context, connectionType ConnectionType, opts *GetDefaultOptions) (GetDefaultResponse, error) where GetDefaultOptions has IncludeCredentials bool

Behavior must match TS samples-dev/connections/connectionsBasics.ts: list with connectionType + defaultConnection=true, then return the first; if IncludeCredentials, follow up with GetWithCredentials on that name
Add tests: (a) without IncludeCredentials asserts only the list request fires; (b) with IncludeCredentials asserts a second GET to /connections/{name}/getConnectionWithCredentials

description: azaiprojects/deployments package defines Deployment + ModelDeployment types matching TS DeploymentUnion
steps: Create azaiprojects/deployments/models.go with type Deployment struct { Name, Type string } and type ModelDeployment struct { Deployment; ModelName, ModelPublisher, ModelVersion string; Sku ModelDeploymentSku }
Define type ModelDeploymentSku struct { Name string; Capacity int32; Family, Size, Tier string }
Add a JSON round-trip test asserting a payload with type:"ModelDeployment",modelName:"gpt-4o" unmarshals into ModelDeployment with ModelName == "gpt-4o"

description: DeploymentsClient.NewListPager issues GET /deployments?api-version=v1 with optional modelPublisher/modelName/deploymentType filters
steps: Create azaiprojects/deployments/client.go with NewClient and NewListPager(opts *ListOptions) where ListOptions has ModelPublisher, ModelName *string and DeploymentType *string
Test 1: NewListPager(nil) — assert request path /deployments, query api-version=v1; fixture returns one ModelDeployment
Test 2: NewListPager(&ListOptions{ModelPublisher: ptr("openai")}) — assert query has modelPublisher=openai

description: DeploymentsClient.Get(ctx, name) issues GET /deployments/{name}?api-version=v1
steps: Implement Get(ctx, name string, opts *GetOptions) (GetResponse, error)
Test: Get(ctx, "my-gpt4o") — assert path /deployments/my-gpt4o, method GET, returned ModelDeployment.Name == "my-gpt4o"

description: azaiprojects/indexes package defines Index, AzureAISearchIndex, ManagedAzureAISearchIndex, CosmosDBIndex types matching TS IndexUnion
steps: Create azaiprojects/indexes/models.go with type Index struct { Name, Version, Type string } and concrete types AzureAISearchIndex { Index; IndexName, ConnectionName string }, ManagedAzureAISearchIndex { Index; FieldMapping FieldMapping; ConnectionName string }, CosmosDBIndex { Index; ... }

Define IndexType string constants: IndexTypeAzureSearch="AzureSearch", IndexTypeManagedAzureSearch="ManagedAzureSearch", IndexTypeCosmosDB="CosmosDB" — confirm exact strings against src/models/models.ts
Add JSON round-trip test for AzureAISearchIndex with type="AzureSearch"

description: IndexesClient.NewListPager issues GET /indexes?api-version=v1
steps: Create azaiprojects/indexes/client.go with NewClient and NewListPager(opts *ListOptions)
Test: pager fires GET /indexes?api-version=v1, fixture returns one AzureAISearchIndex; pager yields one page with one element

description: IndexesClient.NewListVersionsPager(name) issues GET /indexes/{name}/versions?api-version=v1
steps: Test: NewListVersionsPager("my-index") — assert path /indexes/my-index/versions, query api-version=v1

description: IndexesClient.Get(ctx, name, version) issues GET /indexes/{name}/versions/{version}?api-version=v1
steps: Implement Get(ctx, name, version string, opts *GetOptions) (GetResponse, error)

description: IndexesClient.CreateOrUpdate(ctx, name, version, body) issues PATCH /indexes/{name}/versions/{version}?api-version=v1 with merge-patch+json body
steps: Implement CreateOrUpdate(ctx, name, version string, index Index, opts *CreateOrUpdateOptions) (CreateOrUpdateResponse, error) — body is JSON-marshaled index, Content-Type 'application/merge-patch+json' (verify against src/api/indexes/operations.ts)

Test: pass AzureAISearchIndex{Name:"x",Version:"1.0",Type:"AzureSearch",IndexName:"i",ConnectionName:"c"}, assert request method PATCH, path /indexes/x/versions/1.0, request body parses to a JSON object containing type=AzureSearch and indexName=i
Fixture response echoes the index back; assert returned Index.Type == "AzureSearch"

description: IndexesClient.Delete(ctx, name, version) issues DELETE /indexes/{name}/versions/{version}?api-version=v1 and treats 204 as success
steps: Implement Delete(ctx, name, version string, opts *DeleteOptions) (DeleteResponse, error)
Test 1: 204 response — assert no error, request path /indexes/x/versions/1.0, method DELETE
Test 2: 404 response with body {"error":{"code":"NotFound","message":"..."}} — assert error is *azcore.ResponseError with StatusCode 404

description: azaiprojects/datasets package defines DatasetVersion, FileDatasetVersion, FolderDatasetVersion, PendingUploadRequest/Response, DatasetCredential types
steps: Create azaiprojects/datasets/models.go: DatasetVersion{Name,Version,Type,DataURI string}, FileDatasetVersion{DatasetVersion}, FolderDatasetVersion{DatasetVersion}

Add PendingUploadRequest{PendingUploadName,ConnectionName string; PendingUploadType string}, PendingUploadResponse{PendingUploadName, ConnectionName string; PendingUploadType string; BlobReference BlobReference}, BlobReference{BlobURI, StorageAccountARMID string; Credential SasCredential}, SasCredential{Type, SASURI string}, DatasetCredential{BlobReference}
Define DatasetType constants from src/models/models.ts (uri_file, uri_folder)
Add JSON round-trip tests for FileDatasetVersion with type="uri_file"

description: DatasetsClient.NewListPager and NewListVersionsPager fire GET /datasets and /datasets/{name}/versions
steps: Create azaiprojects/datasets/client.go with NewClient, NewListPager(opts), NewListVersionsPager(name, opts)

description: DatasetsClient.Get(ctx, name, version) issues GET /datasets/{name}/versions/{version}?api-version=v1
steps: Implement Get(ctx, name, version string, opts *GetOptions) (GetResponse, error)
Test: Get(ctx, "d1", "1.0") — assert path /datasets/d1/versions/1.0, method GET, returned DatasetVersion.Name == "d1"

description: DatasetsClient.CreateOrUpdate(ctx, name, version, body) issues PATCH /datasets/{name}/versions/{version} with merge-patch+json
steps: Implement CreateOrUpdate(ctx, name, version string, ds DatasetVersion, opts *CreateOrUpdateOptions) (CreateOrUpdateResponse, error)
Test: pass FileDatasetVersion{Name:"d1",Version:"1.0",Type:"uri_file",DataURI:"https://x"}, assert PATCH /datasets/d1/versions/1.0 with body containing type=uri_file

description: DatasetsClient.Delete(ctx, name, version) issues DELETE and treats 204 as success
steps: Implement Delete(ctx, name, version string, opts *DeleteOptions) (DeleteResponse, error)
Test: 204 response — no error, request path /datasets/d1/versions/1.0, method DELETE

description: DatasetsClient.PendingUpload(ctx, name, version, req) issues POST /datasets/{name}/versions/{version}/startPendingUpload
steps: Implement PendingUpload(ctx, name, version string, req PendingUploadRequest, opts *PendingUploadOptions) (PendingUploadResponse, error)

Test: POST /datasets/d1/versions/1.0/startPendingUpload with body {"connectionName":"sc","pendingUploadType":"BlobReference"}; fixture returns BlobReference; assert response BlobReference.BlobURI parsed

description: DatasetsClient.GetCredentials(ctx, name, version) issues POST /datasets/{name}/versions/{version}/credentials
steps: Implement GetCredentials(ctx, name, version string, opts *GetCredentialsOptions) (GetCredentialsResponse, error)
Test: POST /datasets/d1/versions/1.0/credentials, fixture returns DatasetCredential with SASURI, assert parsed

description: azaiprojects.Client exposes Connections(), Deployments(), Indexes(), Datasets() returning configured sub-clients
steps: Add methods on *azaiprojects.Client returning *connections.Client, *deployments.Client, *indexes.Client, *datasets.Client (constructed from the same pipeline/endpoint/apiVersion)
Add azaiprojects/client_subclients_test.go that constructs a Client and asserts each accessor returns a non-nil sub-client whose Endpoint matches

description: examples/connections/main.go compiles and mirrors samples-dev/connections/connectionsBasics.ts
steps: Create examples/connections/main.go that: reads FOUNDRY_PROJECT_ENDPOINT, builds a Client with azidentity.NewDefaultAzureCredential, iterates Connections().NewListPager(nil), calls Get on the first, calls GetWithCredentials, calls GetDefault(ConnectionTypeAzureOpenAI, &GetDefaultOptions{IncludeCredentials: true})

description: examples/deployments/main.go compiles and mirrors samples-dev/deployments/deploymentsBasics.ts
steps: Create examples/deployments/main.go that lists deployments, filters by MODEL_PUBLISHER env, gets one by name

description: examples/indexes/main.go compiles and mirrors samples-dev/indexes/indexesBasics.ts
steps: Create examples/indexes/main.go that calls CreateOrUpdate with an AzureAISearchIndex, Get, NewListVersionsPager, NewListPager, Delete

description: examples/datasets/main.go compiles and mirrors samples-dev/datasets/datasetsBasics.ts (excluding uploadFile/uploadFolder helpers, which are tracked separately)
steps: Create examples/datasets/main.go that calls PendingUpload, CreateOrUpdate, GetCredentials, Get, NewListVersionsPager, NewListPager, Delete

description: Full module build, vet, and tests pass cleanly
steps: Verify exit code 0 and all packages report ok
